simulation_saved_file: Your simulation file has been saved.
download_pdf_report: Do you want to download the PDF report?
select_scenario_and_price: Select scenario and enter start price to continue
position_has_active_data: The position contains active data or orders. Close the position or cancel orders first.
cannot_reduce_leverage: Cannot reduce leverage after position opened
insufficient_data_message: To continue, enter margin and the start price.
margin_locked_message:
After opening a position, margin cannot be changed manually.

To add margin use the 'Average' button.
insufficient_balance_message: Insufficient balance. Please set the required balance first.
simulation_limit_order_hint:
In simulation mode a limit order will be created.
If the specified price is lower than the current price, the calculation will use the current price.
simulation_pro_description_free:
Market behaviour simulation is a PRO feature.

You have 1 free attempt.

Simulation includes:
• Cross and isolated model
• Ability to pause changes
• Forward playback
• Export chart to PDF
simulation_pro_description_paid:
Free attempt used.

To continue using simulation please activate PRO subscription.

PRO version includes:
• Cross mode
• Advanced calculations
• PDF export
• Full simulation control
cross_pro_description:
Cross mode is available only for PRO users.

In the PRO version you get:
• Cross mode
• Advanced calculations
• Additional simulation tools
privacy_text:
Simulation Lab is an educational simulator and is not a financial tool.

The application does not collect personal user data.

All calculations are for informational purposes only.

The developer is not responsible for any financial decisions made by users.
delete_simulation_message: Are you sure you want to delete this simulation journal?
cross_pro_text: Cross mode is available only for PRO users. The PRO version includes cross mode, advanced calculations, and additional simulation tools.
enter_margin_and_price: Enter margin and start price to continue
margin_locked_text: After opening a position margin cannot be changed manually. Use the Average button to add margin.
block_has_data: The position contains active data or orders. Close the position or cancel orders first.
simulation_limit_order_info: In simulation mode a limit order will be created. If the specified price is below the current price, calculation will be done at the current price.
